author: doll-agent
content: Add as_strided_signed / as_strided_signed_unchecked taking &[isize] strides + start_offset. Negative strides need ferray-core RawArrayView wiring (#744); for now they emit a clear diagnostic. 7 tests cover positive-stride parity, start_offset, zero-stride overlap (checked rejects, unchecked accepts), negative-stride diagnostic, and bounds error paths.
